feed.title: RFC: Two years of BIP Editing, time for some new faces?

entry.title: RFC: Two years of BIP Editing, time for some new faces?
entry.summary:
Over the past two years, from April 22, 2024, to April 22, 2026, the team of BIP (Bitcoin Improvement Proposals) Editors has demonstrated significant activity and contributions within the BIPs repository. During this period, the editors have left a total of 4,108 comments and processed 596 pull requests, with 382 of these being successfully merged. Additionally, they facilitated the publication of 42 new BIPs, reflecting a robust engagement with the development and refinement of Bitcoin protocols.
The BIP process itself underwent revisions to enhance its effectiveness, alongside updates to existing documents and cleanup efforts for abandoned submissions. Improvements were also made to the CI (Continuous Integration) scripts, contributing to better management and functionality of the repository. These efforts collectively indicate a rejuvenated interest and participation in the BIPs repository, suggesting a positive trend in its evolution and impact on the broader Bitcoin development discussions.
Despite these achievements, the workload was predominantly handled by just two of the six BIP Editors for the majority of this timeframe. In the first quarter of 2026, the situation intensified as only one editor was actively managing the day-to-day operations, underscoring the demanding nature of the role which ideally requires more hands-on deck than it currently has. In light of this, there is a proposal to refresh the BIP Editor team to consist of three dedicated individuals who are eager and committed to regular contributions towards maintaining and advancing the repository's operations.
This proposed change aims to distribute responsibilities more evenly, ensuring sustainable and effective management of the BIPs repository moving forward. The ongoing discussion and feedback from the community will be crucial in finalizing these adjustments to the editorial team structure.
